description: State-machine contract for a webapp that helps a Swedish mortgage borrower prepare and execute a rate negotiation.

property_price.description: Estimated property value or accepted purchase price.

binding_period.description: Mortgage fixing period the borrower wants to compare.

current_bank.description: Bank that gave the current offer or holds the current mortgage.

current_rate.description: Borrower's current offered or existing mortgage rate.

target_rate.description: Rate the borrower should ask for.

market_rate_context.description: Daily policy, government-bond, and Riksbanken/Refinitiv Stadshypotek CAISSE mortgage-bond proxy context.

bank_offer_comparison.description: Latest listed bank rates compared with SCB market averages and a stylized Swedish mortgage-bond market funding proxy.

bank_margin_context.description: Latest listed rates with stylized CAISSE-based market funding proxy and gross margin by bank and fixing period.

payment_scenarios.description: Monthly payment and annual savings scenarios derived from borrower input and target rates.

haggle_talking_points.description: Negotiation arguments generated from bank margin, market-average discount, and payment impact.

property_profile.label: Property Profile
property_profile.purpose: Collect property price and down payment so the app can calculate loan-to-value and principal.

loan_profile.label: Loan Profile
loan_profile.purpose: Collect loan amount and preferred binding period.

current_offer.label: Current Offer
current_offer.purpose: Capture the current bank and offered rate so the app can quantify negotiation room.

market_context.label: Market Context
market_context.purpose: Show the rate environment that explains where bank pricing should be anchored.

bank_comparison.label: Bank Comparison
bank_comparison.purpose: Compare the current offer against listed rates, SCB market averages, and estimated bank margins.

payment_impact.label: Payment Impact
payment_impact.purpose: Translate target-rate differences into monthly and annual SEK impact.

haggle_arguments.label: Haggle Arguments
haggle_arguments.purpose: Create concrete talking points using market data, bank margin estimates, and payment savings.

call_script.label: Call Script
call_script.purpose: Present a concise script for contacting the bank and asking for the target rate.

outcome_logged.label: Outcome Logged
outcome_logged.purpose: Capture whether the negotiation worked and preserve the result for follow-up.
